projects.title: THREE FLAVOR UNIVERSES. FULL CGI. BROADCAST-READY.
projects.description: Cinema-quality CGI montages for three hero flavors — Crunchy Choco Malt, Avocado Dream, and New York Cheesecake. Full pipeline from Houdini simulations to Blender rendering to After Effects compositing. Delivered on a tight broadcast deadline.

projects.title: BEAT THE INIT SELECTA
projects.description: Our team created a CGI montage for Selecta’s new flavors: Crunchy Choco Malt, Avocado Dream, and New York Cheesecake. Using Houdini, Blender, and After Effects, we simulated realistic textures and dynamics, bringing each ingredient and flavor to life in a visually captivating way.
